final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] input1,
    input [7:0] input2,
    input select,
    output [7:0] selected_out
    );assign selected_out = select ? input2 : input1;
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      selected_out <= ~select & input1 | select & ~input2;
    end
  end

endmodule
